programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: Long Distance DMs to Jacó Dreams
programme.desc: After a DM slide and just one week together, a Canadian is selling everything to relocate and reignite a romance in Jacó, Costa Rica. They're buying a home and working together, he's betting his life savings on a relationship that's yet to be tested.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: Two besties are pooling their cash to buy a shared home in Tulum, Mexico; they want a permanent slice of paradise, but finding a house that suits them both might be the biggest test of their friendship.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: A Leap of Love in Tulum
programme.desc: After nine months of dating, a Canadian couple's ready to find a love nest and build a business in Tulum, Mexico; trading snow for sand is easy, but buying a home with a new partner is a risky move that may be too much too soon.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Empty Nesters are ready to start their new chapter with a lakeside vacation home in Seneca, South Carolina. She doesn't mind spending for a place big enough for the whole family to enjoy, but he's determined to downsize and stay within their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: College sweethearts are moving back to Kentucky in search of a bigger home for their young family; She wants the charm and character of their old home, but he wants a newer build with little renovation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Virginia entrepreneur is in the process of buying her first home and brings her opinionated mother along for help; she's set on finding a grand house to show off her success, but Mom thinks she should look for something smaller and more practical.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newlywed couple struggles to buy their first home before their baby is born in Naples, Florida. They need to get out of his parents' house, and he wants the ultimate party pad, but she's more focused on getting a little privacy from his family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A goal oriented 20-something looks to buy a spacious house and have a renter help with her mortgage in Tacoma, Wash.; but with no homeowner experience, her aunt is along on the search to keep her from getting in over her head.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Building Wealth for Future Family in Chicago
programme.desc: A couple living with his parents and saving for their first place are finally ready to buy in Chicago; she's thinking of their future kids and wants a single-family home, but he's focused on building generational wealth with a multi-unit property.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After moving in with friends to save money, it's time for buyers to find their own home in Missouri; one wants a well-priced single story home, but the other is willing to spend on an eye catching two-story to impress his friends.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple relocates for their careers to Athens, Ga.; she's adamant they find a home that suits their new Southern lifestyle with columns and large porches, but he grew up in a traditional house, so he's ready for something fresh and funky.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An architect wants a piece of property where she can create multiple units in Portland, Ore.; her boyfriend is on board with the plan, as long as there's no massive renovation involved.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: High school sweethearts look to relocate from Ohio for his new job in Burlington, Wash.; he hopes to fulfill his lifelong dream of buying a log cabin, but she wants a vintage farmhouse that she can make her own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newly married couple needs to find a bigger home for themselves and her two children in Dallas. She wants to spend on a move-in-ready place close to town, but he prefers to spend less on something farther out where he can live out his reno dreams.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two picky parents look for a larger home with space for their two kids and rescue pup in Alabama; they find themselves outbid and stuck in real estate purgatory, which is partly due to their struggle to compromise.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: With their baby due soon, a couple are in a hurry to buy their first home in West Virginia; they want a flat yard for their family to play in, but given the area's rugged terrain, that may be a challenge.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple with family across the country want to turn their century-old barn into a home to host everyone; Dave and Jenny take on the massive project and transform their rustic barn into a modern gathering space with unique design choices.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A family purchases their dream lake house and wants Dave and Jenny to completely overhaul their boring basement; with full creative control, the Marrs create a British pub inspired entertaining space, complete with a speakeasy and outdoor oasis.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: The Marrs team up with volunteers to remodel a home for a family, who have faced difficult health battles; with only 24 hours in hand, they struggle against the clock as well as the challenging weather, to give the family the support they deserve.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: After tornado damage made their forever home unlivable, a Bentonville couple needs Dave and Jenny's help to bring life back into the space and create their dream home.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: After a tornado destroyed a family's long-time residence nearly three years ago, they still have been unable to return; Ben and Erin rally the entire community to roll up their sleeves and open their hearts to help finally bring the family back home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin help the City of Laurel and the Laurel Housing Authority to convert a historic building into Laurel's first Visitor's Center; they also take on the restoration of a 1940s public housing unit as part of the exhibit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin return to their alma mater, Jones College, to transform the outdated women's basketball locker room; blending nostalgic collegiate style with heart, they look to create a warm, welcoming second home for the team.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A couple thought they had secured the perfect home, until living in it exposed a layout that frustrates hosting, storage, and each other. They're turning to Jonathan and Drew to help decide if they should stay or risk starting over in a new home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: After multiple setbacks, Dave and Jenny take a last-minute trip to get the renovation back on track in Italy. They face important design decisions when they arrive and need to come up with creative solutions to an ever-expanding budget.

programme.sub-title: Italiano: Old Ways Make New Problems

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: As opening day nears, Dave and Jenny go the extra mile to take on special projects to complete their friend's centuries-old Italian villa.

programme.desc: After seven months on the market, Lyndsay and Leslie battle plumbing problems and water damage to get a small home sold; using unique solutions, the twins transform the crowded entrance, tiny bathroom and rotted deck into a tranquil hideaway.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A homeowner needs help letting go of her colorful home of 25 years; the renovation is a real challenge for Lyndsay and Leslie as they look to transform the color cacophony and convoluted layout into a clean and simple oasis.
